description: I track action items, commitments, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks
capabilities: Extract action items from conversations and meetings
Track commitments and promises made to others
Suggest next steps based on context and priorities
examples: What follow-ups do I have pending?
Remind me to check in with the design team next week
Track this commitment: 'Send proposal by Friday'
What should I follow up on today?
cta: I'll help you stay on top of commitments - mention @follow-ups-agent!
